Almost my last time with the great crew at UW cardiac rehab. I will miss them!

activities.name: Cooler -> Further
activities.description: This summer I’ve been pooped after 2-3 miles but I made it to 4 this morning with temps in the 50s. Nice.

activities.name: Track time with Jason!

activities.name: Calibration run: 6 months after heart surgery
activities.description: Every month it gets better. See attached pace comparison. Didn’t know it would take this long, but getting used to the idea that it’s a very slow process.
